"[6] RECEIVING 911 TEXT FRM 11946 SR1774 -The user's iPhone detected a VEHICLE CRASH that is LIKELY TO HAVE RESULTED IN INJURY. It is UNKNOWN how many OCCUPANTS may have been in the vehicle. This concludes the automatically-assembled data. You may now attempt to contact the user. However, messages may be delayed, and the user may not be able to respond.1 minResponders may need to search an area extending at least 10 meters in all directions for a 95% chance of finding the user. The user's estimated altitude (HAE) is 797 meters. Responders may need to search 30 meters above and below this level for a 95% chance of finding the user. Enhanced Emergency Data may be available. QUERY ADDITIONAL DATA! The user's device battery state is 0-10%. Their verified phone number is +15304575037. [Shared]"
